zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lothrop於1584年12月20日在英國越可爾艾頓受洗時，他的父親Thomas Lothrop48歲，母親Maud30歲。他於1610年與Hannah Howse在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特維爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1634年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯希圖阿潔希圖阿潔 特且於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。他於1623年在英國英格蘭倫敦被列為minister of first independent church of london。他去世於1653年11月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年68歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lothrop于1584年12月20日在英国越可爾艾頓受洗时，他的父亲Thomas Lothrop48岁，母亲Maud30岁。他于1610年与Hannah Howse在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特維爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1634年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯希圖阿潔希圖阿潔 特且于1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。他于1623年在英国英格兰倫敦被列为minister of first independent church of london。他去世于1653年11月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年68岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

nameMeanings.name: Lothrop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lowthorpe in East Yorkshire, named with the Old Norse personal name Logi or Lági + thorp ‘outlying farmstead’.

History: In 1634 the name was brought to North America by the Rev. John Lathrop (born 1584 in Etton, Yorkshire, England), a Puritan preacher fleeing religious persecution. He arrived in Plymouth Colony and lived in Scituate, MA, until 1639, then moved to Barnstable, MA, where his Bible can still be seen.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Lothrop was christened on 20 December 1584, in Etton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Thomas Lothrop, was 48 and his mother, Maud, was 30. He married Hannah Howse in 1610, in Eastwell, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Scituate Center, Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1634 and Barnstable, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1639. In 1623, his occupation is listed as minister of first independent church of london in London, England, United Kingdom. He died on 8 November 1653, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68, and was buried in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

Il a épousé Hannah Howse en 1610, à Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Scituate Center, Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1634 et à Barnstable, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1639. En 1623, sa profession de son indiquée est minister of first independent church of london à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Lui sposato Hannah Howse nel 1610, nel Eastwell, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Scituate Center, Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1634 e nel Barnstable, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1639. ja.lifeSummary: John Lothropが1584年12月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアエットオンで洗礼を受けた時，父Thomas Lothropは48歳，母Maudは30歳であった。1610年にイギリスイギリスケントエアストウエルでHannah Howseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1634年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウススシトゥアトスシトゥアト センターに，1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルに住んでいた。1623年，イギリスイギリスロンドンでの職業はminister of first independent church of londonと記録されている。彼は1653年11月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルで68歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルバーンスタブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lothrop(이)가 1584년 12월 20일 영국 요르크실르 턴에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Lothrop(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1610년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트웰에서 Hannah Howse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1634년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 스시투앳 스시투앳 세터에서, 1639년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 살았다. 1623년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 minister of first independent church of london이었다. 그는 1653년 11월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lothrop foi batizado em 20 de dezembro de 1584, em Etton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Lothrop, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Maud, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Howse em 1610, em Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Scituate Center, Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1634 e em Barnstable, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1639. Em 1623, sua profissão aparece como minister of first independent church of london em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1653, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lothrop был крещен 20 декабря 1584 г. в местности эттон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Lothrop было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Howse в 1610 г. в местности эаствелл, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности сситуэит кентир, сситуэит, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1634 году и в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году. В 1623 году он работал по профессии minister of first independent church of london в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 8 ноября 1653 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lothrop se bautizó el 20 de diciembre de 1584, en Etton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Lothrop, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Maud, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Hannah Howse en 1610, en Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Scituate Center, Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1634 y en Barnstable, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1639. En 1623, su ocupación registrada era minister of first independent church of london en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1653, en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Barnstable, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
